controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - asset liability management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Short Title and Commencement
1 These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - asset liability management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all india financial institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'aifis' and individually as an 'aifi'), viz
controls.control_description:
Applicability
2 These Directions shall be applicable to All India Financial Institutions
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as an 'AIFI'), viz.,
Export Import Bank of India ('EXIM Bank'), National Bank for Agriculture and
Rural Development ('NABARD'), Small Industries Development Bank of India
('SIDBI'), National Housing Bank ('NHB'), and National Bank for Financing
Infrastructure and Development ('NaBFID').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all india financial institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'aifis' and individually as an 'aifi'), viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure become effective from the date of issue
controls.control_description: 3 These Directions shall become effective from the date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become effective from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning as assigned to them below: (1) 'interest rate risk' is the risk where changes in market interest rates might adversely affect an aifi
controls.control_description:
Definitions
4 In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein
shall bear the meaning as assigned to them below:
(1) 'Interest Rate Risk' is the risk where changes in market interest rates
might adversely affect an AIFI's financial condition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning as assigned to them below: (1) 'interest rate risk' is the risk where changes in market interest rates might adversely affect an aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure inability of an aifi to meet cash and collateral obligations as they become due, without adversely affecting its financial condition
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Liquidity Risk' means inability of an AIFI to meet cash and collateral
obligations as they become due, without adversely affecting its financial
condition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inability of an aifi to meet cash and collateral obligations as they become due, without adversely affecting its financial condition

controls.control_objective: To ensure evaluation of the financial position of an aifi under a severe but plausible scenario to assist in decision making within the aifi
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Stress Test' means evaluation of the financial position of an AIFI under a
severe but plausible scenario to assist in decision making within the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evaluation of the financial position of an aifi under a severe but plausible scenario to assist in decision making within the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the br act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification
controls.control_description:
<image>
5 All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the BR Act, the RBI Act, rules / regulations
made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as
used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the br act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification

controls.control_objective: To ensure have overall responsibility for management of risks and shall decide the risk management policy of an aifl and set limits for liquidity, interest rate
controls.control_description:
Responsibilities of the Board
6 The Board shall have overall responsibility for management of risks and shall
decide the risk management policy of an AIFl and set limits for liquidity, interest
rate, exchange rate, and equity price risks.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have overall responsibility for management of risks and shall decide the risk management policy of an aifl and set limits for liquidity, interest rate

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a management committee or any other specific committee, that shall oversee the implementation of the asset liability management (alm) syste
controls.control_description:
The Board shall constitute a
Management Committee or any other specific Committee, that shall oversee
the implementation of the Asset Liability Management (ALM) system and
review its functioning periodically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a management committee or any other specific committee, that shall oversee the implementation of the asset liability management (alm) syste

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate policy and strategy to manage liquidity risk, including the liquidity risk tolerance
controls.control_description:
Approval of policies, limits, and reviews
7 The Board shall formulate policy and strategy to manage liquidity risk, including
the liquidity risk tolerance.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate policy and strategy to manage liquidity risk, including the liquidity risk tolerance

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the volume, composition, maximum maturity / duration, holding, and cut loss limits for the trading book
controls.control_description:
8 The Board / Asset Liability Management Committee (ALCO) shall approve the
volume, composition, maximum maturity / duration, holding, and cut loss limits
for the Trading Book.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the volume, composition, maximum maturity / duration, holding, and cut loss limits for the trading book

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt an integrated value at risk (var) limit for the entire balance sheet, including the "banking book" and the "trading book", for the rupee as well
controls.control_description:
Where the Board is satisfied that the AIFI has necessary
risk management capabilities, it shall adopt an integrated Value at Risk (VaR)
limit for the entire balance sheet, including the "Banking Book" and the "Trading
Book", for the rupee as well as foreign currency portfolio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to adopt an integrated value at risk (var) limit for the entire balance sheet, including the "banking book" and the "trading book", for the rupee as well

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure to move to the modern techniques of interest rate risk measurement like duration gap analysis, simulation, and value at risk 10 the board / alc
controls.control_description:
9 Where an AIFI has adequate MIS and technical capability, the Board / ALCO
shall ensure to move to the modern techniques of Interest Rate Risk
measurement like Duration Gap Analysis, Simulation, and Value at Risk
10 The Board / ALCO shall approve internal prudential limits for cumulative
negative liquidity gaps across all time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure to move to the modern techniques of interest rate risk measurement like duration gap analysis, simulation, and value at risk 10 the board / alc

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the prudential limits for interest rate gaps in various time buckets
controls.control_description:
11 The Board / ALCO shall approve the prudential limits for interest rate gaps in
various time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the prudential limits for interest rate gaps in various time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be set as simple gap limits or in terms of impact on net interest income (nii) / net interest margin (nim) or earnings at risk (ear) of the aifi
controls.control_description:
Such limits on interest rate risk shall be set as simple gap
limits or in terms of impact on Net Interest Income (NII) / Net Interest Margin
(NIM) or Earnings at Risk (EaR) of the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be set as simple gap limits or in terms of impact on net interest income (nii) / net interest margin (nim) or earnings at risk (ear) of the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the classification of components of assets and liabilities in the appropriate time buckets, through reasonable estimation of behavioural patte
controls.control_description:
12 The Board / ALCO shall approve the classification of components of assets and
liabilities in the appropriate time buckets, through reasonable estimation of
behavioural patterns, embedded options, and rolls-in and rolls-out based on
past data or empirical studies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the classification of components of assets and liabilities in the appropriate time buckets, through reasonable estimation of behavioural patte

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish an alm framework for measuring, monitoring, and managing liquidity risk, interest rate risk, and foreign exchange risks
controls.control_description:
Introduction
13 An AIFI shall establish an ALM framework for measuring, monitoring, and
managing liquidity risk, interest rate risk, and foreign exchange risks.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to establish an alm framework for measuring, monitoring, and managing liquidity risk, interest rate risk, and foreign exchange risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure involve the identification and assessment of various types of risks and enable dynamic adjustment of balance sheet items (assets and liabilities) to m
controls.control_description:
The
system shall involve the identification and assessment of various types of risks
and enable dynamic adjustment of balance sheet items (assets and liabilities)
to manage these risks effectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to involve the identification and assessment of various types of risks and enable dynamic adjustment of balance sheet items (assets and liabilities) to m

controls.control_objective: To ensure introduce a formalised framework for management of market risks through measuring, monitoring and managing liquidity, exchange rate, and interest rate
controls.control_description:
14 The ALM system shall introduce a formalised framework for management of
market risks through measuring, monitoring and managing liquidity, exchange
rate, and interest rate risks of an AIFI that need to be closely integrated with the
AIFI's business strategy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to introduce a formalised framework for management of market risks through measuring, monitoring and managing liquidity, exchange rate, and interest rate

controls.control_objective: To ensure also endeavour to enforce the discipline of market risk management, viz
controls.control_description:
The ALM function shall also endeavour to enforce the
discipline of market risk management, viz., managing business after assessing
the market risks involved.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also endeavour to enforce the discipline of market risk management, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be supported by risk policies and tolerance limits
controls.control_description:
ALM Information System
16 The ALM framework shall be supported by risk policies and tolerance limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be supported by risk policies and tolerance limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure the implementation of necessary information system and availability of timely, adequate, and accurate information, which shall be central to th
controls.control_description:
The Top Management shall ensure the implementation of necessary
information system and availability of timely, adequate, and accurate
information, which shall be central to the ALM process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure the implementation of necessary information system and availability of timely, adequate, and accurate information, which shall be central to th

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a minimum, establish systems sufficient to generate liquidity gap and interest rate gap reports in accordance with these directions
controls.control_description:
<image>
17 An AIFI shall, at a minimum, establish systems sufficient to generate liquidity
gap and interest rate gap reports in accordance with these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at a minimum, establish systems sufficient to generate liquidity gap and interest rate gap reports in accordance with these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for successful implementation of the risk management framework
controls.control_description:
ALM Organisation
18 The Top Management of the AIFI shall be responsible for successful
implementation of the risk management framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for successful implementation of the risk management framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be integrated with the aifi's basic operations and strategic decision-making
controls.control_description:
The risk management
framework shall be integrated with the AIFI's basic operations and strategic
decision-making.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be integrated with the aifi's basic operations and strategic decision-making

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up an alco as a decision-making unit responsible for integrated balance sheet management from a risk-return perspective, including the strategic m
controls.control_description:
19 An AIFI shall set up an ALCO as a decision-making unit responsible for
integrated balance sheet management from a risk-return perspective, including
the strategic management of interest rate and liquidity risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set up an alco as a decision-making unit responsible for integrated balance sheet management from a risk-return perspective, including the strategic m

controls.control_objective: To ensure define the roles, responsibilities, and powers of its alco, its responsibility would normally include: (1) monitoring the market risk levels of the ai
controls.control_description:
While each AIFI
shall define the roles, responsibilities, and powers of its ALCO, its responsibility
would normally include:
(1) monitoring the market risk levels of the AIFl by ensuring adherence to the
various risk limits set by the Board;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to define the roles, responsibilities, and powers of its alco, its responsibility would normally include: (1) monitoring the market risk levels of the ai

controls.control_objective: To ensure be aligned with the interest rate outlook as also on other parameters considered relevant
controls.control_description:
Future business strategy shall be aligned with
the interest rate outlook as also on other parameters considered relevant;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be aligned with the interest rate outlook as also on other parameters considered relevant

controls.control_objective: To ensure depend on the size of the aifi, business mix and its organisational complexity
controls.control_description:
Composition of ALCO
20 The composition of ALCO in an AIFI shall depend on the size of the AIFI,
business mix and its organisational complexity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to depend on the size of the aifi, business mix and its organisational complexity

controls.control_objective: To ensure head the committee
controls.control_description:
The CEO / CMD / DMD or the
ED should head the Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to head the committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be represented in the alco
controls.control_description:
The Top Management from various relevant
<image>
functions / departments shall be represented in the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be represented in the alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, as its members, the heads of investment, credit, resources management, treasury, risk management, and other members as deemed suitable
controls.control_description:
The ALCO shall
include, as its members, the Heads of Investment, Credit, Resources
Management, Treasury, Risk Management, and other members as deemed
suitable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, as its members, the heads of investment, credit, resources management, treasury, risk management, and other members as deemed suitable

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide the frequency of alco meetings
controls.control_description: An AIFI shall decide the frequency of ALCO meetings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide the frequency of alco meetings

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for analysing, monitoring, and reporting the risk profiles to the alco
controls.control_description:
21 An AIFI may also constitute an ALM Support Group, consisting of the operating
staff, which shall be responsible for analysing, monitoring, and reporting the risk
profiles to the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for analysing, monitoring, and reporting the risk profiles to the alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure also prepare forecasts (simulations) reflecting the impact of various possible changes in market conditions on the balance sheet and recommend the act
controls.control_description:
The staff shall also prepare forecasts (simulations)
reflecting the impact of various possible changes in market conditions on the
balance sheet and recommend the action needed to adhere to internal limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also prepare forecasts (simulations) reflecting the impact of various possible changes in market conditions on the balance sheet and recommend the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the following: (1) liquidity risk management
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the following: (1) liquidity risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess the risks resulting from its inability to meet its obligations as they come due, because of difficulty in liquidating assets (market liquidity
controls.control_description:
Management of Liquidity Risk
23 An AIFI should assess the risks resulting from its inability to meet its obligations
as they come due, because of difficulty in liquidating assets (market liquidity
risk) or in obtaining adequate funding (funding liquidity risk).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess the risks resulting from its inability to meet its obligations as they come due, because of difficulty in liquidating assets (market liquidity

controls.control_objective: To ensure include analysis of sources and uses of funds, an understanding of the funding markets in which the aifi operates, and an assessment of the efficacy o
controls.control_description:
This assessment
should include analysis of sources and uses of funds, an understanding of the
funding markets in which the AIFI operates, and an assessment of the efficacy
of a contingency funding plan for events that could arise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include analysis of sources and uses of funds, an understanding of the funding markets in which the aifi operates, and an assessment of the efficacy o

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the relationship between liquidity and capital since liquidity risk can impact capital adequacy which, in turn, can aggravate an aifi's liqui
controls.control_description:
The Top Management
shall consider the relationship between liquidity and capital since liquidity risk
can impact capital adequacy which, in turn, can aggravate an AIFI's liquidity
risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider the relationship between liquidity and capital since liquidity risk can impact capital adequacy which, in turn, can aggravate an aifi's liqui

controls.control_objective: To ensure be communicated throughout the aifi and be reflected in the strategy and policies that top management set to manage liquidity risk
controls.control_description:
The risk tolerance shall be communicated throughout the AIFI and be reflected
in the strategy and policies that Top Management set to manage liquidity risk.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be communicated throughout the aifi and be reflected in the strategy and policies that top management set to manage liquidity risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account the cost, benefit, and risk of liquidity into its internal pricing, performance measurement, and new product approval process of all
controls.control_description:
Further, an AIFI shall take into account the cost, benefit, and risk of liquidity into
its internal pricing, performance measurement, and new product approval
process of all significant business activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into account the cost, benefit, and risk of liquidity into its internal pricing, performance measurement, and new product approval process of all

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure time bucketing of contingent cash flows emanating from the off-balance sheet items as per the timing of the underlying cash flows for the purpo
controls.control_description:
25 An AIFI shall ensure time bucketing of contingent cash flows emanating from
the off-balance sheet items as per the timing of the underlying cash flows for
the purpose of compiling the liquidity and interest rate gap reports, as
discussed in subsequent paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure time bucketing of contingent cash flows emanating from the off-balance sheet items as per the timing of the underlying cash flows for the purpo

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up a robust framework to identify, measure, monitor, and control liquidity risk
controls.control_description:
26 An AIFI shall set up a robust framework to identify, measure, monitor, and
control liquidity risk.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to set up a robust framework to identify, measure, monitor, and control liquidity risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure project cash flows arising from assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet items over an appropriate set of time horizons
controls.control_description:
The framework shall project cash flows arising from assets,
liabilities, and off-balance sheet items over an appropriate set of time horizons.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to project cash flows arising from assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet items over an appropriate set of time horizons

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure diversification in both the tenor and source of funding
controls.control_description:
The process shall also ensure diversification in both the tenor and source of
funding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure diversification in both the tenor and source of funding

controls.control_objective: To ensure utilise early warning indicators to identify the emergence of increased risk or vulnerabilities in its liquidity position or funding needs
controls.control_description:
27 An AIFI shall utilise early warning indicators to identify the emergence of
increased risk or vulnerabilities in its liquidity position or funding needs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to utilise early warning indicators to identify the emergence of increased risk or vulnerabilities in its liquidity position or funding needs

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the ability to control liquidity risk exposure and funding needs, regardless of its organisation structure, within and across legal entities, bus
controls.control_description:
It shall
have the ability to control liquidity risk exposure and funding needs, regardless
of its organisation structure, within and across legal entities, business lines, and
<image>
currencies, taking into account any legal, regulatory and operational limitations
to the transferability of liquidity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the ability to control liquidity risk exposure and funding needs, regardless of its organisation structure, within and across legal entities, bus

controls.control_objective: To ensure perform stress tests or scenario analyses on a regular basis in order to identify and quantify its exposures to possible future liquidity stresses, an
controls.control_description:
28 An AIFI shall perform stress tests or scenario analyses on a regular basis in
order to identify and quantify its exposures to possible future liquidity stresses,
analysing possible impacts on the institutions' cash flows, liquidity positions,
profitability, and solvency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to perform stress tests or scenario analyses on a regular basis in order to identify and quantify its exposures to possible future liquidity stresses, an

controls.control_objective: To ensure be discussed thoroughly by the top management
controls.control_description:
The results of these stress tests shall be discussed
thoroughly by the Top Management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be discussed thoroughly by the top management

controls.control_objective: To ensure form the basis for taking remedial or mitigating actions to limit the aifi's exposures, build up a liquidity cushion, and adjust its liquidity profile
controls.control_description:
These discussions, shall form the basis for
taking remedial or mitigating actions to limit the AIFI's exposures, build up a
liquidity cushion, and adjust its liquidity profile to fit its risk tolerance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to form the basis for taking remedial or mitigating actions to limit the aifi's exposures, build up a liquidity cushion, and adjust its liquidity profile

controls.control_objective: To ensure also play a key role in shaping the aifi's contingency funding planning, which shall outline policies for managing a range of stress events and clearl
controls.control_description:
The
results of stress tests shall also play a key role in shaping the AIFI's
contingency funding planning, which shall outline policies for managing a range
of stress events and clearly set out strategies for addressing liquidity shortfalls
in emergency situations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also play a key role in shaping the aifi's contingency funding planning, which shall outline policies for managing a range of stress events and clearl

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the maturity ladder approach as the standard tool for measuring and managing net funding requirements through preparation of statement of liquid
controls.control_description:
Statement of Liquidity
29 An AIFI shall adopt the maturity ladder approach as the standard tool for
measuring and managing net funding requirements through preparation of
Statement of Liquidity as furnished in Annex-I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt the maturity ladder approach as the standard tool for measuring and managing net funding requirements through preparation of statement of liquid

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for measuring the future cash flows of aifis in different time buckets
controls.control_description:
30 The Maturity Profile, as detailed in Annex-III, shall be used for measuring the
future cash flows of AIFIs in different time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for measuring the future cash flows of aifis in different time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed as under: (1) 1 to 14 days
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed as under: (1) 1 to 14 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following preconditions: <image> (1) the composition and volume of the trading book shall be clearly defined
controls.control_description:
31 The securities which are held in the Trading Book shall be subject to the
following preconditions:
<image>
(1) The composition and volume of the Trading Book shall be clearly defined;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following preconditions: <image> (1) the composition and volume of the trading book shall be clearly defined

controls.control_objective: To ensure be restricted
controls.control_description: (2) Maximum maturity / duration of the trading portfolio shall be restricted;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be restricted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prescribed
controls.control_description: (4) Cut-loss limit(s) shall be prescribed;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prescribed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be marked-to-market on a daily / weekly basis and the revaluation gain / loss shall be charged to the profit and loss account
controls.control_description:
and
(5) Such securities shall be marked-to-market on a daily / weekly basis and
the revaluation gain / loss shall be charged to the profit and loss account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be marked-to-market on a daily / weekly basis and the revaluation gain / loss shall be charged to the profit and loss account

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the volume, composition, maximum maturity / duration, holding / defeasance period, and cut loss limits of the trading book
controls.control_description:
33 The Board / ALCO of the AIFI shall approve the volume, composition,
maximum maturity / duration, holding / defeasance period, and cut loss limits of
the Trading Book.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the volume, composition, maximum maturity / duration, holding / defeasance period, and cut loss limits of the trading book

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option, with the approval of its board, to adopt an integrated value at risk (var) limit for its entire balance sheet, including the "banking
controls.control_description:
34 An AIFI that has the necessary risk management capabilities, shall have the
option, with the approval of its Board, to adopt an integrated Value at Risk
(VaR) limit for its entire balance sheet, including the "Banking Book" and the
"Trading Book", for the rupee as well as foreign currency portfolio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to have the option, with the approval of its board, to adopt an integrated value at risk (var) limit for its entire balance sheet, including the "banking

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the department of supervision (dos), reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
A copy of the
approved policy note in this regard, shall be submitted to the Department of
Supervision (DoS), Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the department of supervision (dos), reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be guided by the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfolio) direc
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall also be guided by the
Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Classification, Valuation
and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be guided by the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfolio) direc

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor mismatches arising from cash inflows and outflows
controls.control_description:
35 Within each time bucket, an AIFI shall monitor mismatches arising from cash
inflows and outflows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor mismatches arising from cash inflows and outflows

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 10 per cent and 15 per cent respectively, of the cash outflows in each time bucket
controls.control_description:
The negative gap for 1-14 days and 15-28 days time-
buckets shall not exceed 10 per cent and 15 per cent respectively, of the cash
outflows in each time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 10 per cent and 15 per cent respectively, of the cash outflows in each time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure also monitor the cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets by establishing internal prudential limits approved by the board / alco
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall also monitor the cumulative
mismatches (running total) across all time buckets by establishing internal
prudential limits approved by the Board / ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also monitor the cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets by establishing internal prudential limits approved by the board / alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare the statement of liquidity in the format prescribed at
controls.control_description: 36 An AIFI shall prepare the Statement of Liquidity in the format prescribed at
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare the statement of liquidity in the format prescribed at

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a cash outflow while a maturing asset will be a cash inflow
controls.control_description:
A maturing liability shall be a
cash outflow while a maturing asset will be a cash inflow.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a cash outflow while a maturing asset will be a cash inflow

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare, on an ongoing basis, currency-wise statement of liquidity and interest rate sensitivity (irs) statement, separately for each of the currencie
controls.control_description:
Chapter V - Management of Currency Risk
38 In order to capture the Liquidity and Interest Rate Risk arising out of the foreign
currency portfolio, an AIFI shall prepare, on an ongoing basis, currency-wise
Statement of Liquidity and Interest Rate Sensitivity (IRS) Statement, separately
for each of the currencies in which it has an exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare, on an ongoing basis, currency-wise statement of liquidity and interest rate sensitivity (irs) statement, separately for each of the currencie

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prepared in the formats prescribed at annex i-a and annex-ii-a, which are similar to the formats prescribed for the rupee resources, at annex-i and
controls.control_description:
These statements shall
be prepared in the formats prescribed at Annex I-A and Annex-II-A, which are
similar to the formats prescribed for the rupee resources, at Annex-I and
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prepared in the formats prescribed at annex i-a and annex-ii-a, which are similar to the formats prescribed for the rupee resources, at annex-i and

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the traditional gap analysis (tga) to measure the interest rate risk
controls.control_description:
40 An AIFI shall use the Traditional Gap Analysis (TGA) to measure the interest
rate risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the traditional gap analysis (tga) to measure the interest rate risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure measure gap or mismatch risk by calculating gaps, i
controls.control_description:
Traditional Gap Analysis
41 Under TGA, an AIFI shall measure Gap or Mismatch risk by calculating Gaps,
i.e., difference between rate sensitive liabilities and rate sensitive assets
(including off-balance sheet positions), over different time intervals at a given
date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to measure gap or mismatch risk by calculating gaps, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare the gap report by grouping rate sensitive liabilities, assets and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to residual maturity
controls.control_description:
42 An AIFI shall prepare the Gap Report by grouping rate sensitive liabilities,
assets and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to residual
maturity or next re-pricing period, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to prepare the gap report by grouping rate sensitive liabilities, assets and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to residual maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as interest rate sensitive
controls.control_description:
All investments,
advances, deposits, borrowings, and purchased funds, that mature / re-price
within a specified timeframe, shall be treated as interest rate sensitive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as interest rate sensitive

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be classified as rate sensitive
controls.control_description:
Any
<image>
principal repayment of loan, including final principal payment and interim
instalment expected to be received within the time horizon shall also be
classified as rate sensitive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be classified as rate sensitive

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as rate sensitive at the time of repricing
controls.control_description:
Interest bearing assets and liabilities that vary with
a reference rate and reprice at pre-determined intervals shall be treated as rate
sensitive at the time of repricing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as rate sensitive at the time of repricing

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as rate sensitive
controls.control_description:
While the interest rates on term deposits are
fixed during their currency, the tranches of advances portfolio with floating rates
shall be treated as rate sensitive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as rate sensitive

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare interest rate sensitivity statement as per the reporting format provided in annex-ii
controls.control_description:
Interest Rate Sensitivity Statement
43 An AIFI shall prepare Interest Rate Sensitivity statement as per the reporting
format provided in Annex-II.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare interest rate sensitivity statement as per the reporting format provided in annex-ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify the interest rate gaps in the following time buckets: (1) 1-28 days
controls.control_description:
44 An AIFI shall identify the interest rate gaps in the following time buckets:
(1) 1-28 days;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify the interest rate gaps in the following time buckets: (1) 1-28 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure slot the securities in the trading book as per their residual maturity or repricing maturity for floating rate securities
controls.control_description:
45 An AIFI shall slot the securities in the Trading Book as per their residual
maturity or repricing maturity for floating rate securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to slot the securities in the trading book as per their residual maturity or repricing maturity for floating rate securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified into respective time-buckets, as explained in annex-iv
controls.control_description:
The various items of
rate sensitive assets, liabilities and off-balance sheet items shall be classified
into respective time-buckets, as explained in Annex-IV.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified into respective time-buckets, as explained in annex-iv

controls.control_objective: To ensure set prudential limits on individual gaps with the approval of the board / alco
controls.control_description:
46 An AIFI shall set prudential limits on individual Gaps with the approval of the
Board / ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set prudential limits on individual gaps with the approval of the board / alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a relationship with the total assets, earning assets, or equity
controls.control_description:
The prudential limits shall have a relationship with the Total
Assets, Earning Assets, or Equity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a relationship with the total assets, earning assets, or equity

controls.control_objective: To ensure set the prudential limits linked to ear or nim based on its views on interest rate movements, with the approval of the board / alco
controls.control_description:
In addition to the interest rate gap limits, an
AIFI which has adequate systems in place may set the prudential limits linked
to EaR or NIM based on its views on interest rate movements, with the
approval of the Board / ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set the prudential limits linked to ear or nim based on its views on interest rate movements, with the approval of the board / alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as indicated in annex-i and annex-ii
controls.control_description:
Behavioural Pattern and Embedded Options
47 The classification of various components of assets and liabilities into different
time buckets for preparation of Gap reports (Liquidity and Interest Rate
Sensitivity) may be as indicated in Annex-I and Annex-II.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as indicated in annex-i and annex-ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure choose to classify them in the appropriate time buckets
controls.control_description:
48 However, an AIFI which is better equipped to reasonably estimate the
behavioural pattern, embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, etc., of various
components of assets and liabilities on the basis of past data / empirical studies
may choose to classify them in the appropriate time buckets, subject to the
approval from its ALCO / Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to choose to classify them in the appropriate time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent to the department of supervision (dos), rbi
controls.control_description:
A copy of the note approved by the ALCO /
Board shall be sent to the Department of Supervision (DoS), RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent to the department of supervision (dos), rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess and manage the risk arising from embedded options such as premature closure of term deposits, early encashment of bonds, and prepayment of loan
controls.control_description:
49 An AIFI shall assess and manage the risk arising from embedded options such
as premature closure of term deposits, early encashment of bonds, and
prepayment of loans and advances, which can significantly affect its liquidity
and interest rate risk profile, particularly during periods of market volatility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess and manage the risk arising from embedded options such as premature closure of term deposits, early encashment of bonds, and prepayment of loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop suitable mechanism, supported by empirical studies and behavioural analysis, to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities, and off-
controls.control_description:
An
AIFI shall develop suitable mechanism, supported by empirical studies and
behavioural analysis, to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities, and
off-balance sheet items to changes in market variables and estimate the impact
of embedded options.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop suitable mechanism, supported by empirical studies and behavioural analysis, to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities, and off-

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify the entire amount payable under the embedded options in the maturity ladder according to the residual period up to the earliest exercise date
controls.control_description:
In the absence of adequate historical database, an AIFI
shall classify the entire amount payable under the embedded options in the
maturity ladder according to the residual period up to the earliest exercise date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify the entire amount payable under the embedded options in the maturity ladder according to the residual period up to the earliest exercise date

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement a scientifically designed internal transfer pricing (itp) mechanism as part of its alm system
controls.control_description:
Internal Transfer Pricing
50 An AIFI shall implement a scientifically designed internal transfer pricing (ITP)
mechanism as part of its ALM system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement a scientifically designed internal transfer pricing (itp) mechanism as part of its alm system

controls.control_objective: To ensure enable centralisation of interest rate risk management, thereby facilitating effective oversight and control, and also provide a rational and consiste
controls.control_description:
The transfer pricing mechanism shall
enable centralisation of interest rate risk management, thereby facilitating
effective oversight and control, and also provide a rational and consistent
framework for the pricing of assets and liabilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enable centralisation of interest rate risk management, thereby facilitating effective oversight and control, and also provide a rational and consiste

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare the statement of liquidity on a fortnightly basis, as per
controls.control_description: An AIFI shall prepare the Statement of Liquidity on a fortnightly basis, as per
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare the statement of liquidity on a fortnightly basis, as per

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare the interest rate sensitivity statement on a monthly basis, as per chapter vi
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall prepare the Interest Rate Sensitivity statement on a monthly
basis, as per Chapter VI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare the interest rate sensitivity statement on a monthly basis, as per chapter vi

controls.control_objective: To ensure regularly review these statements and formulate corrective measures and devise suitable strategies wherever needed
controls.control_description:
Top Management / Board/ ALCO shall regularly review these statements and
formulate corrective measures and devise suitable strategies wherever needed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to regularly review these statements and formulate corrective measures and devise suitable strategies wherever needed

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the statement of liquidity and the interest rate sensitivity statement to department of supervision (dos), rbi on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall submit the Statement of Liquidity and the Interest Rate Sensitivity
Statement to Department of Supervision (DoS), RBI on a quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the statement of liquidity and the interest rate sensitivity statement to department of supervision (dos), rbi on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed shall continue to
remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
56 Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
Application of other laws not barred
57 The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
Interpretations
58 For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in the time- bucket as per purpose/end-use specified
controls.control_description: However, if such gifts, grants, etc., are tied to specific end-use, then these may be slotted in the time- bucket as per purpose/end-use specified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in the time- bucket as per purpose/end-use specified

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported in the currency-wise liquidity statement for the relative currency
controls.control_description: The amount of foreign currency bonds/ borrowings which has been deployed in foreign currency assets on a back-to-back basis, should be reported in the currency-wise liquidity statement for the relative currency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported in the currency-wise liquidity statement for the relative currency

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted as per the residual period to the earliest exercise date
controls.control_description:
In the absence of
<image>
adequate historical database, the entire amount payable under the embedded options should be slotted as per the residual period to the earliest exercise date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted as per the residual period to the earliest exercise date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in the time bucket corresponding to their residual maturity for the full amount of maturity / face value
controls.control_description: c) Zero-coupon / deep discount bonds Such bonds, if issued without any embedded options, should be shown in the time bucket corresponding to their residual maturity for the full amount of maturity / face value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in the time bucket corresponding to their residual maturity for the full amount of maturity / face value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted as per their residual maturity
controls.control_description: b) Inter Corporate Deposits These being institutional / wholesale deposits, should be slotted as per their residual maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted as per their residual maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in respective time buckets as per the residual period to the due date of payment
controls.control_description: The cash outflows should be slotted in respective time buckets as per the residual period to the due date of payment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in respective time buckets as per the residual period to the due date of payment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in 1 - 14 days time-bucket
controls.control_description: The amount of interest overdue (including the amount pre- funded in the account with RBI for servicing of outstanding SLR bonds pending claims from investors) should be shown in 1 - 14 days time-bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in 1 - 14 days time-bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated at the floating rate applicable on the reporting date
controls.control_description: In case of floating rate bonds/deposits, the amount of interest outflow may be calculated at the floating rate applicable on the reporting date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated at the floating rate applicable on the reporting date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be netted out from the gross amount of the loan portfolio and the net amount of loan assets be shown as an item under inflows in stipulated time-bucke
controls.control_description: e) Provisions for NPAs and the Standard assets The amount of provision may be netted out from the gross amount of the loan portfolio and the net amount of loan assets be shown as an item under inflows in stipulated time-buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be netted out from the gross amount of the loan portfolio and the net amount of loan assets be shown as an item under inflows in stipulated time-bucke

controls.control_objective: To ensure be netted from the gross value of investments portfolio and the net investments be shown as inflow in the prescribed time-slots
controls.control_description: f) Provision for Investments portfolio The amount may be netted from the gross value of investments portfolio and the net investments be shown as inflow in the prescribed time-slots.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be netted from the gross value of investments portfolio and the net investments be shown as inflow in the prescribed time-slots

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in 'over 10 years' bucket
controls.control_description: In case provisions are not held security- wise, the provision may be shown in 'over 10 years' bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in 'over 10 years' bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in time buckets as prescribed below at items 7(a) and 7(b) respectively
controls.control_description: However, the bonds/debentures valued by applying NPA norms due to non-servicing of interest, should be shown in time buckets as prescribed below at items 7(a) and 7(b) respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in time buckets as prescribed below at items 7(a) and 7(b) respectively

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted as per the specific disinvestment plan formulated for such holdings
controls.control_description:
package, should be slotted as per the specific disinvestment
plan formulated for such holdings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted as per the specific disinvestment plan formulated for such holdings

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as an inflow in the 'over 10 year' bucket
controls.control_description: In case, a specific disinvestment plan has not been evolved, the equity holdings should be shown as an inflow in the 'Over 10 year' bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as an inflow in the 'over 10 year' bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in respective time buckets as per the timing of the cash flows as stipulated in the original/revised repayment schedule
controls.control_description:
b) Term loans (rupee loans including the export Loans funded out of rupee resources but denominated in foreign currencies)
The cash inflows on account of the interest and principal of the loan may be slotted in respective time buckets as per the timing of the cash flows as stipulated in the original/revised repayment schedule.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in respective time buckets as per the timing of the cash flows as stipulated in the original/revised repayment schedule

controls.control_objective: To ensure report such assets in the rupee liquidity statement since such loans are funded out of rupee resources
controls.control_description: The AIFI which finance its exporter-clients out of rupee resources but denominate such loans in their books in foreign currency to be extinguished out of the export proceeds, should report such assets in the rupee liquidity statement since such loans are funded out of rupee resources.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report such assets in the rupee liquidity statement since such loans are funded out of rupee resources

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake time- series analysis and slot such loans as per behavioural maturity
controls.control_description: However, the AIFI which have the adequate database on the past pre-payment behaviour of such loans, may undertake time- series analysis and slot such loans as per behavioural maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake time- series analysis and slot such loans as per behavioural maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown net of the provisions, interest suspense held and the amount of claims received from ecgc
controls.control_description:
Non-performing loans
(May be shown net of the provisions, interest suspense held and the amount of claims received from ECGC.)
a) Sub-standard
<image>
i) All overdues and instalments of principal falling due during the next three years
In the 3 to 5 year time-bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown net of the provisions, interest suspense held and the amount of claims received from ecgc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in respective time buckets as per the timing of the cash flow
controls.control_description: Assets on lease Entire cash flows from the lease transaction, representing principal as well as interest element, may be slotted in respective time buckets as per the timing of the cash flow.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in respective time buckets as per the timing of the cash flow

controls.control_objective: To ensure be captured and not only till the reporting date
controls.control_description: As regards the future income from assets, the cash inflow over the entire life of the asset should be captured and not only till the reporting date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be captured and not only till the reporting date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned only in respect of standard assets at the level existing on the reporting date and for debt securities, the interest income should be reck
controls.control_description: However, for loan assets, the future income should be reckoned only in respect of standard assets at the level existing on the reporting date and for debt securities, the interest income should be reckoned as inflow only if the interest is serviced regularly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned only in respect of standard assets at the level existing on the reporting date and for debt securities, the interest income should be reck

controls.control_objective: To ensure be estimated and this amount could be distributed in various time buckets on judgmental basis
controls.control_description:
Contingent cash flows

a) Letters of credit/guarantees (outflow through Devolvement)
Based on the past trend analysis of the devolvements vis-a-vis the outstanding amount of LCs / guarantees (net of margins held), the likely devolvements should be estimated and this amount could be distributed in various time buckets on judgmental basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be estimated and this amount could be distributed in various time buckets on judgmental basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity buckets on the basis of probable recovery dates
controls.control_description: The assets created out of devolvements may be shown under respective maturity buckets on the basis of probable recovery dates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity buckets on the basis of probable recovery dates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted as an outflow in the time-buckets arrived at keeping in view the validity period of lc / shipment schedule under lc / due date of bills sti
controls.control_description:
The LCs established against sanctioned assistance would be in the nature of undisbursed commitments and should be slotted as an outflow in the time-buckets arrived at keeping in view the validity period of LC / shipment schedule under LC / due date of bills stipulated under the LC b) Loan commitments pending disbursal / undisbursed commitments (outflow)
Only that amount of undisbursed commitments should be captured in the liquidity report in respect of which the notice for draw- down has been received from the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted as an outflow in the time-buckets arrived at keeping in view the validity period of lc / shipment schedule under lc / due date of bills sti

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in the respective time buckets as per the sanctioned disbursement schedule
controls.control_description: In case, however, the terms of sanction do not stipulate any notice to be given by the borrower, the entire amount of undisbursed commitment should be slotted in the respective time buckets as per the sanctioned disbursement schedule.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in the respective time buckets as per the sanctioned disbursement schedule

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in the relative time buckets as per the stipulated repayment schedule under the terms of sanction, only in respect of the amount reckoned a
controls.control_description:
c) Repayments against the undisbursed commitments
Such future inflows should be slotted in the relative time buckets as per the stipulated repayment schedule under the terms of sanction, only in respect of the amount reckoned at item (b) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in the relative time buckets as per the stipulated repayment schedule under the terms of sanction, only in respect of the amount reckoned a

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reckoned in deciding the appropriate time bucket
controls.control_description: However, if the draw-down under the line of credit is subject to a specified notice period of more than 14 days, such notice period should also be reckoned in deciding the appropriate time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reckoned in deciding the appropriate time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in the relative time bucket as per the time schedule of ipo/finalisation of allotment
controls.control_description: e) Underwriting commitments (outflow) Based on the analysis of the past trend of devolvement of underwriting commitments, the amount of such commitments may be slotted in the relative time bucket as per the time schedule of IPO/finalisation of allotment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in the relative time bucket as per the time schedule of ipo/finalisation of allotment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in the liquidity statement of the respective currencies
controls.control_description: The cash flows relating to currency swaps may be shown in the liquidity statement of the respective currencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in the liquidity statement of the respective currencies

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in a time bucket corresponding to timing of such cash flows
controls.control_description: outflow due to wage settlement arrears, capital expenses, income tax refunds, etc.) should be shown in a time bucket corresponding to timing of such cash flows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in a time bucket corresponding to timing of such cash flows

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted as below:
controls.control_description: Overdue receivables on account of interest and instalments of standard loans should be slotted as below:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted as below:

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed the prudential limit of 10 per cent and 15 per cent respectively of the cash outflows of each time-bucket
controls.control_description:
Financing of liquidity gaps:
The negative gap (i.e., where outflows exceed inflows) in the 1 to 14 days and 15 to 28 days time-bucket should not exceed the prudential limit of 10 per cent and 15 per cent respectively of the cash outflows of each time-bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to exceed the prudential limit of 10 per cent and 15 per cent respectively of the cash outflows of each time-bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown by a footnote in the relative statement
controls.control_description: In case these limits are exceeded, the measures proposed for bringing the gaps within the limit, should be shown by a footnote in the relative statement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown by a footnote in the relative statement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in respective time buckets as per the re-pricing dates
controls.control_description: re-price on the roll- over / re-pricing date should be slotted in respective time buckets as per the re-pricing dates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in respective time buckets as per the re-pricing dates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted as per the residual period to the earliest exercise date
controls.control_description: In the absence of adequate historical database, the entire amount payable under the embedded options should be slotted as per the residual period to the earliest exercise date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted as per the residual period to the earliest exercise date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be
controls.control_description: To be slotted in respective time buckets as per residual maturity or as per residual lock-in period, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in the earliest /shortest time bucket
controls.control_description: The prematurely withdrawable deposits with no lock-in period or past such lock-in period, should be slotted in the earliest /shortest time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in the earliest /shortest time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in the 1 to 28 days time-bucket
controls.control_description: In case of borrowings from RBI linked to the Policy Rate, the entire amount of borrowing should be slotted in the 1 to 28 days time-bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in the 1 to 28 days time-bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in 1 - 28 days time-bucket
controls.control_description: e) Provisions The amount of interest overdue (including the amount pre- funded in the account with RBI for servicing of outstanding old SLR bonds pending claims from investors) should be shown in 1 - 28 days time-bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in 1 - 28 days time-bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated at the floating rate applicable as on the reporting date
controls.control_description:
f) Interest payable on bonds / deposits / borrowings In case of floating rate bonds/deposits, the amount of interest
<image>
outflow may be calculated at the floating rate applicable as on the reporting date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated at the floating rate applicable as on the reporting date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed as per the residual period till each of the contractual cash flows
controls.control_description: The contractual cash outflows under the IRS / FRAs / currency swaps should be placed as per the residual period till each of the contractual cash flows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed as per the residual period till each of the contractual cash flows

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in the irs statement of the respective currencies
controls.control_description: The cash flows relating to currency swaps may be shown in the IRS statement of the respective currencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in the irs statement of the respective currencies

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted as per their residual maturity (or <image> repricing maturity in case of floating rate instruments)
controls.control_description:
The FIs which maintain separate 'Trading Book' consisting of securities which comply with the stipulations of paragraph 31 of the Directions and duly approved as such by the Board / ALCO, should be slotted as per their residual maturity (or
<image>
repricing maturity in case of floating rate instruments).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted as per their residual maturity (or <image> repricing maturity in case of floating rate instruments)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided on judgemental basis
controls.control_description: As regards the dividends on preference shares, particularly on cumulative ones, the bucket may be decided on judgemental basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be decided on judgemental basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown, net of provisions made, in the time buckets prescribed at items b
controls.control_description: However, the bonds / debentures valued by applying NPA norms due to non-servicing of interest, should be shown, net of provisions made, in the time buckets prescribed at items B.7(a) and B.7(b) in Annex III.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown, net of provisions made, in the time buckets prescribed at items b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted as per the specific disinvestment plan formulated for such holdings
controls.control_description: However, the equity holdings in the assisted companies, acquired as part of the overall financing package, should be slotted as per the specific disinvestment plan formulated for such holdings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted as per the specific disinvestment plan formulated for such holdings

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as an inflow in the non-sensitive bucket
controls.control_description: In case, a specific disinvestment plan has not been evolved, the equity holdings should be shown as an inflow in the Non-sensitive bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as an inflow in the non-sensitive bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted as per the timing of the cash flow
controls.control_description: The interest cash flows on the loans will be sensitive on receipt and should be slotted as per the timing of the cash flow.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted as per the timing of the cash flow

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in time buckets which correspond to the reset date when the rate might be changed in response to the changes in their plr or market interes
controls.control_description: The amount of term loans should be slotted in time buckets which correspond to the reset date when the rate might be changed in response to the changes in their PLR or market interest rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in time buckets which correspond to the reset date when the rate might be changed in response to the changes in their plr or market interes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted as per the timing of the interest payment
controls.control_description: The interest amount would be sensitive on receipt and should be slotted as per the timing of the interest payment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted as per the timing of the interest payment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated at the rate applicable on the reporting date
controls.control_description: The amount of interest should be calculated at the rate applicable on the reporting date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated at the rate applicable on the reporting date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be captured and not only till the reporting date
controls.control_description: As regards the future income from assets (such as deposits, loans & investments), the cash inflow over the entire life of the asset should be captured and not only till the reporting date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be captured and not only till the reporting date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned only in respect of standard assets and for debt securities, the interest income should be reckoned as inflow only if the interest is servi
controls.control_description: However, for loan assets, the future income should be reckoned only in respect of standard assets and for debt securities, the interest income should be reckoned as inflow only if the interest is serviced regularly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned only in respect of standard assets and for debt securities, the interest income should be reckoned as inflow only if the interest is servi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be slotted in the relative time buckets as per the stipulated repayment schedule under the terms of sanction
controls.control_description: Such future inflows should be slotted in the relative time buckets as per the stipulated repayment schedule under the terms of sanction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be slotted in the relative time buckets as per the stipulated repayment schedule under the terms of sanction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed as per the residual period till each of the contractual cash flows
controls.control_description: The contractual cash inflows under the IRS / FRAs / currency swaps should be placed as per the residual period till each of the contractual cash flows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed as per the residual period till each of the contractual cash flows
